source_label: Kiro — official About page ("Kiro rhymes with hero")
notes: Kiro is Amazon/AWS's agentic IDE (2025), centered on spec-driven development: it turns prompts into structured requirements, design, and tasks that AI agents implement. Stress on the first syllable — KEER-oh (/ˈkɪroʊ/). The official About page explicitly says the name "rhymes with hero." Non-native devs are pulled by the spelling toward "KY-roh" (long-i, like gyro or Cairo), which is wrong; the written i maps to a near-/ee/ vowel, not the long-i diphthong.
